history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian male, appearing to be in his late teens, stands in a public restroom, taking a mirror selfie. He is wearing a white Taekwondo uniform with black trim around the collar and sleeves. A black belt is tied around his waist, knotted in the front. On the left chest of the uniform, there's a small square patch with colorful embroidery, possibly a Taekwondo emblem. His hair is dark and neatly styled. He holds a black smartphone in his right hand, positioned to capture the reflection.

The background is a typical restroom setting with beige tiled walls. A glass partition separates the stall he's in from the rest of the restroom. A toilet paper dispenser with a white roll is visible on the wall behind him. The lighting is bright and slightly diffused, likely from overhead fluorescent lights, creating a slight glare on the mirror and his phone. The overall color palette is dominated by neutral tones – beige tiles, white uniform, and black belt. The mood is casual and slightly posed, typical of a mirror selfie. The image is a medium shot, focusing on the upper body and face of the subject. The reflection in the mirror is sharp, showing the details of his attire and the environment.
